scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.read
scopes.description: Read SAP ABAP objects via MCP

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.write
scopes.description: Write SAP ABAP objects via MCP

role-templates.name: MCPViewer
role-templates.description: Read-only access to SAP via ARC-1 MCP

role-templates.name: MCPDeveloper
role-templates.description: Read and write access to SAP via ARC-1 MCP

role-templates.name: MCPDataViewer
role-templates.description: Preview named table contents via ARC-1 MCP

role-templates.name: MCPSqlUser
role-templates.description: Execute freestyle SQL queries via ARC-1 MCP

role-collections.name: ARC-1 Viewer
role-collections.description: Read-only SAP access via ARC-1 MCP

role-collections.name: ARC-1 Developer
role-collections.description: Read-write SAP access via ARC-1 MCP

role-collections.name: ARC-1 Data Viewer
role-collections.description: Read-only SAP access with table data preview

role-collections.name: ARC-1 Developer + Data
role-collections.description: Developer access with table data preview

role-collections.name: ARC-1 Developer + SQL
role-collections.description: Developer access with freestyle SQL queries
